generated_comment: Yeh bilkul serial wali story lagti hai. Aadmi galat hoga apni jagah, lekin agar us aurat ko pata tha ki woh shaadi-shuda hai toh phir usne door rehna chahiye tha, ghar todne ka kaam kyu kiya? Aise cases mein sab us aadmi ko bolte hain, par asli nuksan toh wohi ladki karti hai jo beech mein aati hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it places primary blame for an affair on the woman and frames her as a 'homewrecker' while minimizing the man's responsibility. It encodes blame asymmetry, 'she knew he was married' framing, and family-protection rhetoric.
original_frame: Prenup, Alimony as Reverse Dowry, Women
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 36. Single. A divorced man living in Delhi. You are commenting under your real name on a Facebook post about a celebrity couple's divorce where the wife is seeking 50 percent of her husband's assets despite having worked for only two years of their eight year marriage. You are commenting on whether what she is asking for is justified and what it says about why women get married.
